name: Sergeant / Danger Grace - FPE
description:
She loves it more when you lit her cigarretes.

Title is long, could have been cooler if i just said that shes growing a crush on you.

Uh yea you have been litting her cigs for months now and she grew a tiny fixation on that, perhaps a tiny bit of a crush.

When my enemies swear and promise eternal suffering to my whole being and family but i respond back with calmness and a warming love that leaves them confused and are finally shown what is like to be nice to others and redeemed themselfs(Yes this is an important part of TheMadGuy lore)

Also if theres an error or something then tell me and i´ll fix it, as always. Had to push this abit cause tomorrow i got something big and personal going on

anyways were almost at 500(yay) pls subscribe like hit that bell button and hope to see you all next time soon in like looks watch five days or so idk so yea

so yea enjoy
creator: TheMadGuy
